历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 2322; in 2023, approximately 2227; in 2024, approximately 1979; in 2025, approximately 1513 for the Physics Category (taking the worse of two major groups, 1513). Overall, there is a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 809 places over the past 4 years, and a shift of about 466 places from 2024 to 2025, a significant improvement. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for Physics Category (Science): 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 21 in 2025, 24 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 3 students, a clear expansion (+14.3%), easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (45th in 2025, 44th in 2024), with stable rankings around 44th in recent years, slightly rising to 42nd in 2026, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. The 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant drop in the filing ranking of the Journalism and Communication major. In 2026 reputation data, there is no entry related to Central University of Finance and Economics, indicating no recent notable public opinion events. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 97th, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure on short video platforms. Regarding historical filing anomalies, the 2023 drop in the Journalism and Communication major's filing ranking was a local phenomenon and did not affect overall admissions. Applied Economics (A) and Theoretical Economics (A-) are both at A- or above, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics. Statistics (corresponding to the first-level discipline of Statistics) is not listed as A- or above in the university's discipline evaluation but is an important supporting discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2026 major popularity analysis, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates and diverting some high-scoring students. Finance/Economics major popularity is divided and wait-and-see, with a popularity index of 60.96, cooling compared to previous years. The total number of Ningxia Gaokao candidates in 2026 is approximately 66,000 (including uncertain marks), with an estimated Physics Category of about 44,550 based on recent proportions, basically flat compared to 44,491 in 2025, indicating a stable candidate pool. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Ningxia candidates, with relatively strong regional appeal. The university enrolls a small number of students in Ningxia (24 in Physics Category), making it a small-scale enrollment province, and the expansion of 3 students has a relatively noticeable impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1513, the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (21→24, +14.3%), the basically flat total number of candidates, the diversion of some finance/economics students to popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, and the stable university reputation, the expansion eases competition, but the diversion effect of popular engineering majors may weaken the ranking backward shift caused by expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1673, with a range of 1422–1924.

For rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 1550–1750), prioritize Economics, Computer Science, and Public Finance. For rankings near the upper bound (around 1924), it is recommended to prioritize Statistics, Mathematics, and Management Science and Engineering as safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 328; in 2023, approximately 283 (lowest in recent years); in 2024, approximately 540 (highest in recent years); in 2025, approximately 410 for history category. Overall, it shows a fluctuating trend, peaking in 2023, then significantly dropping in 2024, and recovering in 2025 but still below the 2023 level; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 410; the enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's history (liberal arts) category: 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 18 in 2025, 17 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a decrease of 1 person, a slight reduction in enrollment, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 42nd in 2026 (45th in 2025, 44th in 2024), with a stable ranking around 44th in recent years, rising slightly to 42nd in 2026, making it a top national finance and economics institution; in 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant drop in the filing ranking of the Journalism and Communication major; in 2026 reputation data, there are no entries related to Central University of Finance and Economics, indicating no recent notable public opinion events; its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 97th, rated as "average," with moderate to low exposure on short video platforms and no high-attention signals; regarding historical filing anomalies, the drop in the filing ranking of the Journalism and Communication major in 2023 was a localized phenomenon and did not affect overall admissions; Applied Economics (A) and Theoretical Economics (A-), both rated A- or above, highly correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics, highlighting outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/economics majors are rated as "divergent and wait-and-see" in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with a popularity index of 60.96, showing a cooling trend compared to 2022; engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to rise in popularity, diverting some student sources from finance and economics; the total number of candidates in Ningxia's 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 66,000 (including uncertain markers), with an estimated history category of about 21,450 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as the 21,406 in 2025, indicating a stable candidate pool; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application for Ningxia candidates, with relatively strong regional appeal; the university enrolls a small number of students in Ningxia (17 in history category), making it a small-scale enrollment province, where adjustments in enrollment plans are more sensitive to ranking impacts.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 410, the slight reduction in the 2026 history category enrollment plan (18→17), the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the cooling and divergence of finance/economics major popularity, and the stable university reputation, the enrollment reduction slightly intensifies competition, but the cooling major popularity somewhat suppresses application enthusiasm, with the two factors offsetting each other, leading to a slight forward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 386, with a range of 328–444.
